name: NutriTrack
oneLineDescription: AI-powered nutrition tracking application for easy meal logging and dietary insights
whatItIs: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application designed to help users easily log meals, understand their dietary habits, and improve overall health. The product focuses on speed, simplicity, and intelligent automation to reduce the friction typically associated with food tracking.
crossCuttingPrinciples: Mobile-first approach using React Native for frontend
Speed, simplicity, and intelligent automation to reduce friction
Free tier with limited AI usage versus premium tier with unlimited AI features
specSummary: NutriTrack is an AI-powered nutrition tracking application focused on simplifying daily meal logging through intelligent automation. The product targets individuals managing weight, fitness enthusiasts tracking macros, busy users seeking low-effort logging, and nutrition beginners. Core features include manual food entry, AI photo logging with automatic food identification and calorie estimation, comprehensive nutrition tracking with daily calorie and macronutrient breakdown, customizable goals for weight management, and AI-driven insights with personalized feedback and habit detection. The technical architecture employs React Native for mobile-first development, Node.js backend, PostgreSQL database, cloud storage for images, and OpenAI integration for food recognition. The monetization strategy offers a free tier with basic manual logging and limited AI usage, while premium subscribers get unlimited AI photo logging, advanced insights, and meal recommendations. The MVP scope includes user authentication, manual meal logging, basic calorie tracking, simple dashboard, and one AI feature, explicitly excluding advanced meal planning, analytics, wearable integrations, and social features for post-MVP development.
